task_completion.description: Open the Epi Info 7 Map module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 application is open, specifically showing the Maps module interface.
The layer manager, data source dialog, or map interface shows 'Chicago_WNV_Tests.csv' loaded as a data source.

task_completion.description: Create a point map using the dataset coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: A point layer configuration dialog is visible mapping Latitude and Longitude, or data points are rendered on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Filter the data to show only 'positive' results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data filter dialog shows a condition like 'RESULT = positive', or the map canvas displays exactly 7 data points (filtered down from the total 15).

task_completion.description: Save the map as wnv_positive_map.png in the EpiData folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog shows the file being saved as 'wnv_positive_map.png' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\', or a File Explorer window shows the newly created image file in that specific directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to create the map
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 graphical interface. The agent did not use Python, R, QGIS, or terminal commands to generate the map.

integrity.description: The map was genuinely generated within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The map with the data points is visible within the Epi Info 7 Map module canvas before being exported, proving it was not downloaded or faked.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to fake the output file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch wnv_positive_map.png' or 'cp' to bypass the actual export process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 15 total records, but only 7 have RESULT='positive'. The correctly filtered map should display exactly 7 data points located in the Chicago area. The expected output file must be named 'wnv_positive_map.png' and saved exactly in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\'.
